_comment: Maps the (often truncated) team labels in Yahoo draft-results text exports to the real team/manager from bigboard.json's Kepners Team sheet. Team names can be renamed season to season -- if a future year's export shows a label that doesn't match any key here, kepners_analysis.py will flag it as unmatched rather than guess. Confirmed with Sean 2026-07-21 (including the Orson Welles -> YaBoi/Neary case, which had no textual match and was inferred by elimination).
